summary: Iteration 59 — Verifier-Config reasoning-effort feature: PASSED end-to-end. Validated round-trip persistence on /judge-config for both benches, conditional visibility (gemini-3-flash-preview / gpt-5.5 show, gemini-flash-latest hides), reset-to-Off when switching to unsupported model and back, and submit-payload stamping with POST /api/eval/jobs intercepted. All 7 review-request scenarios passed.
scope_tested: Frontend RunEvalModal submit payload (testing + scratch) with route interception

results.1_testing_round_trip_low: PASS — model=gemini-3-flash-preview, effort=low saved + persisted after reload
results.2_effort_visibility_hide_show: PASS — hidden for gemini-flash-latest, visible for gemini-3-flash-preview & gpt-5.5
results.3_effort_resets_to_off: PASS — switching to unsupported then back resets effort to Off (not 'high')
results.4_scratch_round_trip_medium: PASS — scratch_bench_phased model+effort=medium persisted after reload
results.7_off_omits_judge_thinking: PASS — with effort=Off, experiments keys = [prod_job_id, hitl_input, golden_output, judge_prompt, judge_model]; NO judge_thinking key

critical_code_review_comments: JudgeConfigDialog.js — effort reset effect ('if !modelSupportsEffort && effort!=off => setEffort(off)') correctly triggers on model change; verified via manual reproduction.
RunEvalModal.js stamps judge_thinking only when judgeConfig.effort truthy (non-empty string) — correctly omits when Off. Same for browser_thinking.
evalApi.updateVerifierConfig passes effort verbatim (sent as '' when Off) — matches backend contract.

Note: scratchVerifier stamping is also gated on dataset_type==='scratch_bench_phased' (not just bench select) which means mixed-type batches will only stamp browser_thinking on scratch problems — sensible but worth documenting.

success_rate.backend: n/a (backend curl previously verified by main agent)

seed_data_creation: No persistent test data created. Verifier configs (testing + scratch) were mutated during tests; left in: testing_agent_bench={model:gemini-3-flash-preview, effort:''(Off)}, scratch_bench_phased={model:gemini-3-flash-preview, effort:'medium'}. Reset-to-default on each from /judge-config if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: POST /api/eval/jobs interception works via page.route('**/eval/jobs**') AND '**/api/eval/jobs**' (auth interceptor appends ?access_token=...). Modal Step 2 requires a non-empty Group Name (data-testid 'eval-group-name') before the Next button enables. To close the agent multiselect dropdown without dismissing the modal, click on 'eval-group-name' (DO NOT press Escape — it closes the modal). Agent multiselect testids: 'eval-testing-agents-multiselect-*' on the testing_agent_bench flow, 'eval-agents-multiselect-*' on the standard scratch flow.
